definition: Predictable churn pattern: month 1 at 20%+, month 3 at 10%, month 6 critical inflection, stabilizes at 2% thereafter.
rationale: Three members cohere tightly around temporal retention drop-offs with specific percentages at inflection points. Centroid well-chosen.

aliases: AI as Cost Advantage Not Feature
definition: Success hides the effort required; invisible struggle is the price of credible output.
rationale: Cohesive metaphorical cluster. All members articulate the same idea: effort is hidden from observers; outcomes are visible but cost is not.

splits.definition: Customers buy outcomes not time; one-on-one delivery increases perceived success.
First responder wins sales; faster contact + location indicators reduce buyer hesitation.
Ultra-specific focus (tenant-side, 80% portfolio) decommoditizes vs. generalist positioning.

definition: Variance 0.105 indicates scattered members; four distinct mechanisms emerge.
rationale: High variance with disparate mechanisms: franchisee trust, contact speed, and niche specialization do not form one concept. Aggressive split yields cleaner L0s.

definition: Constraints force creativity; scarcity (limited supply, rare capital deals, limited access) drives price and desire.
rationale: Seven members converge on constraint-as-engine: capital constraints force creativity, rare deals are precious, scarcity enables pricing. Centroid strong.

definition: Fear dissolves when named as specific worst-case; most imagined catastrophes are survivable.
rationale: AI Safety is orthogonal (edge-case misuse governance, not personal risk-taking psychology). Other three members bind tightly on fear→crystallization→survival arc. Kick outlier.

definition: Realness compounds; content from true belief stands out without forced differentiation.
rationale: Four members tightly cohere around authenticity-as-competitive-advantage in saturated media. All speak to truth-driven communication.

definition: Keep passive investments passive to avoid opportunity cost; active money returns more than passive.
rationale: Three members all frame the same decision: do not let passive investments (REITs, funds) create active distraction. Tight and actionable.

definition: Pay to compress learning curve; mentorship shortcut years into months.
rationale: Buy-vs-build (contractors vs. full-time) is an orthogonal hiring decision, not partnerships. Other three members cohere on paying for accelerated learning. Kick outlier, rename to focus.

definition: Four to five major business seasons remain; allocation discipline determines scale.
rationale: Three members converge tightly on finite-season scarcity and intentional deployment. High cohesion (intra_sim 0.93). Excellent cluster.

definition: AI disrupts low-risk creators first (consistency-demonstrators); high-risk creators protected by proof requirements.
rationale: Generic 'Risk Reduction' (fraud reduction, processing speed) is not about creator vulnerability. Other four members cohere on creator-type exposure gradient. Kick outlier.

definition: Founder capacity and systems maturity gate scale; ego drives premature expansion before economics solidify.
rationale: Five members all identify capacity constraints (founder training dependency, broken models, accountability) as bottleneck. Cohesive.

definition: Growth requires sacrifice; choose consciously what to abandon (balance, debt, multiple streams, fulfillment).
rationale: Six members all frame the same insight: every path to scale demands trade-off acceptance. Centroid excellent; tight variance (0.064).

definition: Shame lives in darkness; reframe group exposure as healing not embarrassment; distinguish shame (others' rules) from guilt (own rules).
rationale: Three members bind on emotional taxonomy and social-signal psychology. Tight and actionable for positioning.

definition: Ultra-specific niche enables 10-100x pricing and conversion; one-on-one premium tier funds scalable growth.
rationale: Four members tightly cohere: narrow focus → pricing power → growth funding. Bootstrap tier + scaled tier strategy is coherent.

definition: Build on your strengths, not others' templates; copy exactly first to learn, then improve; don't compare beginning to someone's middle.
rationale: Four members converge on personal differentiation and learning-curve realism. Tight and motivational.
